# handle

**Instance Property**

A reference to the layer hierarchy that you add to the hosting view.

## Declaration

```swift
@MainActor var handle: LayerHierarchyHandle { get }
```

## Overview

Get the handle in your extension process, then use XPC to send it to the browser app. In the browser app, add the handle to a [doc://com.apple.BrowserEngineKit/documentation/BrowserEngineKit/LayerHierarchyHostingView].
title: handle
